footer.tagline: Eawlma is the trusted real estate marketplace of the Kingdom — discover, list, and lease properties across Saudi Arabia with confidence.
footer.needHelp: Need help? Talk to us on WhatsApp.
footer.regaLicensed: Saudi Real Estate General Authority Licensed

about.title: About Eawlma
about.subtitle: Eawlma is the trusted real-estate marketplace of the Kingdom — connecting buyers, renters, and verified agents across Saudi Arabia with a faster, cleaner, and more transparent property experience.
about.missionBody: We're building the most trusted property platform in Saudi Arabia by combining local expertise with a thoughtful product. Every listing is reviewed for accuracy, every agent is verified, and every conversation between a buyer and an agent happens in a secure, auditable channel.
about.kingdomBody: From Riyadh's Olaya district to Jeddah's Corniche and Dammam's waterfront, Eawlma indexes properties across Saudi Arabia's growing cities. The platform is fully bilingual, RTL-first, and respects PDPL data-protection requirements by design.
about.teamBody: A small Riyadh-based team of engineers, designers, and real-estate professionals. We're hiring across product, engineering, and customer success.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Our team responds within 24 hours. For urgent listing or account questions, WhatsApp is the fastest channel.
contact.name: Your name
contact.sentSuccess: Thanks! Our team will respond within 24 hours.

profile.title: My Account
profile.signInPrompt: Sign in to access your account
profile.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

location.mapUnavailable: Map pin picker unavailable. Coordinates fall back to {{lat}}, {{lng}}.

shortTerm.title: Short-term rental details
shortTerm.subtitle: Guests will book this listing by the night. Configure stay rules, amenities, and pricing tiers.
shortTerm.cancelFlexible: Flexible — full refund up to 24 hours before
shortTerm.cancelModerate: Moderate — full refund up to 5 days before
shortTerm.cancelStrict: Strict — 50% refund up to 7 days before

mediaStep.imageDropHint: Drag & drop photos here, or click to choose. JPEG / PNG / WebP up to 10 MB.
mediaStep.videoDropHint: Drag an MP4 file or click to choose. Max 500 MB.
mediaStep.modelDropHint: Upload a GLB/GLTF model to enable AR. Max 50 MB.

amenitiesStep.hint: Tap the amenities this property offers. We'll surface them as filters on Search.

settings.title: Settings
settings.agencyNamePlaceholder: Set up by your agency admin
settings.notifyOnInquiry: Email me when I receive a new inquiry
settings.notifyOnMessage: Email me when I receive a new message
settings.preferencesAutoSave: Notification preferences are saved automatically. You will receive in-app notifications for new inquiries, messages, and listing updates in real-time via the notification bell in the navbar.
settings.passwordChanged: Password changed. All other sessions have been signed out.
settings.deleteWarning: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This will sign you out and remove your access to Eawlma. We'll keep audit/payment records as required by law.
settings.verificationDescription: Verify with Saudi national ID or Iqama via Authentica.sa to earn the gold verified badge on your public profile. Listings from verified agents convert significantly better.
settings.verificationNotConfigured: Authentica.sa API key isn't configured on the server — your verification has been recorded as pending for testing. Set AUTHENTICA_API_KEY in the backend to use the live flow.
settings.otpComing: You'll receive an OTP shortly to complete verification.

oath.agentListingBreakdown: Platform commission: 0.5% of the transaction value, payable upon successful sale or lease closure.
oath.buyerAgentCommission: Agent commission: 2.5% of the transaction value.
oath.buyerPlatformFee: Platform fee: 0.5% of the transaction value.
